description_long: This is a striking double-neck electric guitar with a solid, contoured body finished in a deep blue color with black accents. The instrument features two full necks, each with its own set of frets and tuning pegs, allowing for versatile play styles and tunings. The body is equipped with multiple pickups, control knobs, and switches, all mounted on a glossy surface that reflects light. Chrome hardware, including bridge and pickup covers, adds a metallic contrast to the predominantly blue and black color scheme. The fretboards are marked with inlays, and the headstocks are angled, each fitted with six tuning pegs in a symmetrical arrangement. This guitar is designed for performance and visual impact, making it a centerpiece in any urban music setting.
description: A double-neck electric guitar with a glossy blue and black finish, chrome hardware, and two full sets of frets and tuning pegs. It features multiple pickups and control knobs for versatile play.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full double-neck layout, blue body, and chrome hardware details.
description_view_1: View from the headstock end, highlighting the dual necks, tuning pegs, and fretboard inlays.
description_view_2: Side angle emphasizing the contoured body shape and the alignment of the two necks.
description_view_3: View from the body end, focusing on the pickups, control knobs, and bridge hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Dual headstocks, each with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, standard electric guitar contour
